entity: 2000-01 NBA Finals: Los Angeles Lakers def. Philadelphia 76ers 4-1 (Shaq's 2nd Finals MVP, AI's lone Finals appearance)
notes: Indexed from the LAL side (1610612747). The Shaq/Kobe three-peat started in 2000 (already a separate fixture pattern), continued in 2001 (this), and concluded in 2002. LAL went 15-1 in the 2001 playoffs (4-0 POR, 4-0 SAC, 4-0 SAS, 4-1 PHI), the best single-postseason record in NBA history.
